name: Buffet Make-Your-Own Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 oz pineapple chunks in juice - drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Broiler-fryer chickens. Cook, skin, bone and cut into bite-sized pieces.
2. Use chicken gravy or a combination of broth, chicken soup, and gravy for the gravy component.
3. Heat chicken and gravy together and place in a pretty serving or chafing dish.
4. Place other ingredients in a decorative fashion on a buffet table.
5. Guests can build their own salads using these provided ingredients.
6. This recipe can be made in advance and stored separately, ready to assemble when needed.
